preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'utente' AND column_name = 'id' AND (column_default IS NOT NULL OR is_identity = 'YES')

changeSet.author: developer
changeSet.comment: rinomina tipo -> ruolo sulla permessi_party preesistente

changeSet.author: developer
changeSet.comment: aggiunge ruolo se mancante del tutto

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'permessi_party' AND column_name = 'id' AND (column_default IS NOT NULL OR is_identity = 'YES')

changeSet.comment: permessi_party.id autoincrement se la tabella preesistente non lo aveva

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN pg_get_serial_sequence('permessi_party', 'id') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: allinea la sequence di permessi_party.id al massimo attuale
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('permessi_party', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT max(id) FROM permessi_party), 0) + 1, false)

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN pg_get_serial_sequence('utente', 'id') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: allinea la sequence di utente.id al massimo attuale
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('utente', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT max(id) FROM utente), 0) + 1, false)

changeSet.author: developer
changeSet.comment: tipo permesso sul personaggio: PROPRIETARIO | VISUALIZZATORE

changeSet.author: developer
changeSet.comment: relazione utente-party con ruolo: MASTER | GIOCATORE

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'stat_value' AND column_name = 'id' AND (column_default IS NOT NULL OR is_identity = 'YES')

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN pg_get_serial_sequence('stat_value', 'id') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: allinea la sequence di stat_value.id al massimo attuale
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('stat_value', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT max(id) FROM stat_value), 0) + 1, false)

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'permessi_personaggi' AND column_name = 'tipo' AND is_nullable = 'YES'

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'personaggio' AND column_name = 'id' AND (column_default IS NOT NULL OR is_identity = 'YES')

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN pg_get_serial_sequence('personaggio', 'id') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: allinea la sequence di personaggio.id al massimo attuale
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('personaggio', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT max(id) FROM personaggio), 0) + 1, false)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'avanzamento' AND column_name = 'id' AND (column_default IS NOT NULL OR is_identity = 'YES')

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN pg_get_serial_sequence('avanzamento', 'id') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

changeSet.comment: allinea la sequence di avanzamento.id al massimo attuale
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('avanzamento', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT max(id) FROM avanzamento), 0) + 1, false)

changeSet.author: developer

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM stats WHERE id IN ('MR', 'MA', 'MO', 'MP')

changeSet.comment: stat monete: rame, argento, oro, platino
